name: Deploy — Staging

on:
  push:
    branches: [staging]

concurrency:
  group: deploy-staging-spring-server
  cancel-in-progress: false

permissions:
  contents: read
  packages: write

jobs:
  build-push:
    name: Build & push image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      tag: ${{ steps.tag.outputs.tag }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - id: tag
        run: echo "tag=sha-${GITHUB_SHA:0:7}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        id: meta
        with:
          images: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/tmag-spring-server
          tags: |
            type=raw,value=${{ steps.tag.outputs.tag }}
            type=raw,value=latest-staging

      # Maven layer cache — avoids re-downloading dependencies on every build
      - uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2/repository
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-maven-${{ hashFiles('pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: ${{ runner.os }}-maven-

      - uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: .
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=registry,ref=ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/tmag-spring-server:latest-staging
          cache-to: type=inline

  deploy:
    name: Deploy spring-server to staging
    needs: build-push
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: ${{ vars.STAGING_API_URL }}
    steps:
      - uses: webfactory/ssh-agent@v0.9.0
        with:
          ssh-private-key: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_KEY }}

      - run: ssh-keyscan -H "${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

      - name: Write spring-server env on server
        env:
          STAGING_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          STAGING_USER: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USER }}
          STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH }}
          # Injected directly — not written to runner disk in plaintext
          SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DB_URL }}
          SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DB_USER }}
          SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DB_PASSWORD }}
          JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.STAGING_JWT_SECRET }}
          APP_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.STAGING_API_KEY }}
          REDIS_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_REDIS_HOST }}
          REDIS_PORT: ${{ secrets.STAGING_REDIS_PORT }}
          REDIS_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.STAGING_REDIS_PASSWORD }}
          SPRING_MAIL_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_MAIL_HOST }}
          SPRING_MAIL_PORT: ${{ secrets.STAGING_MAIL_PORT }}
          SPRING_MAIL_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.STAGING_MAIL_USERNAME }}
          SPRING_MAIL_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.STAGING_MAIL_PASSWORD }}
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          VERTEX_PROJECT_ID: ${{ secrets.VERTEX_PROJECT_ID }}
          FLUTTERWAVE_PUBLIC_KEY: ${{ secrets.FLUTTERWAVE_PUBLIC_KEY }}
          FLUTTERWAVE_SECRET_KEY: ${{ secrets.FLUTTERWAVE_SECRET_KEY }}
          FLUTTERWAVE_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${{ secrets.FLUTTERWAVE_ENCRYPTION_KEY }}
          PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY: ${{ secrets.PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY }}
        run: |
          # Write a fresh .env for spring-server on the staging server via SSH.
          # All values come from GitHub Secrets — never touch runner disk in plaintext.
          ssh "$STAGING_USER@$STAGING_HOST" \
            DEPLOY_PATH="$STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH" \
            DB_URL="$SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL" \
            DB_USER="$SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME" \
            DB_PASS="$SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD" \
            JWT="$JWT_SECRET" \
            API_KEY="$APP_API_KEY" \
            REDIS_H="$REDIS_HOST" \
            REDIS_P="$REDIS_PORT" \
            REDIS_PW="$REDIS_PASSWORD" \
            MAIL_H="$SPRING_MAIL_HOST" \
            MAIL_P="$SPRING_MAIL_PORT" \
            MAIL_U="$SPRING_MAIL_USERNAME" \
            MAIL_PW="$SPRING_MAIL_PASSWORD" \
            ANTHROPIC="$ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" \
            VERTEX="$VERTEX_PROJECT_ID" \
            FW_PUB="$FLUTTERWAVE_PUBLIC_KEY" \
            FW_SEC="$FLUTTERWAVE_SECRET_KEY" \
            FW_ENC="$FLUTTERWAVE_ENCRYPTION_KEY" \
            PS_SEC="$PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY" \
            'bash -s' <<'REMOTE'
          set -euo pipefail
          # Overwrite .env atomically
          umask 077
          cat > "$DEPLOY_PATH/.env" <<ENV
          SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL=$DB_URL
          SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME=$DB_USER
          SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD=$DB_PASS
          SPRING_JPA_HIBERNATE_DDL_AUTO=validate
          SPRING_FLYWAY_ENABLED=true
          SPRING_FLYWAY_BASELINE_ON_MIGRATE=true
          SPRING_FLYWAY_LOCATIONS=classpath:db/migration
          SPRING_FLYWAY_VALIDATE_ON_MIGRATE=true
          SPRING_FLYWAY_SCHEMAS=public
          JWT_SECRET=$JWT
          APP_API_KEY=$API_KEY
          REDIS_HOST=$REDIS_H
          REDIS_PORT=${REDIS_P:-6379}
          REDIS_PASSWORD=$REDIS_PW
          SPRING_MAIL_HOST=$MAIL_H
          SPRING_MAIL_PORT=${MAIL_P:-587}
          SPRING_MAIL_USERNAME=$MAIL_U
          SPRING_MAIL_PASSWORD=$MAIL_PW
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=$ANTHROPIC
          VERTEX_PROJECT_ID=$VERTEX
          APP_AI_PROVIDER=anthropic
          APP_AI_MAIN_PROVIDER=anthropic
          APP_AI_DEFAULT_MODEL=claude-sonnet-4-6
          APP_AI_MAIN_MODEL=claude-sonnet-4-6
          APP_AI_SUMMARY_MODEL=claude-haiku-4-5-20251001
          APP_AI_FREE_MODEL=claude-haiku-4-5-20251001
          APP_AI_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=8192
          APP_AI_SUMMARY_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=2048
          FLUTTERWAVE_PUBLIC_KEY=$FW_PUB
          FLUTTERWAVE_SECRET_KEY=$FW_SEC
          FLUTTERWAVE_ENCRYPTION_KEY=$FW_ENC
          PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY=$PS_SEC
          APP_ENV=staging
          APP_STORAGE_PATH=/app/storage/upload
          APP_LOGGING_ERROR_FILE_ENABLED=true
          APP_LOGGING_ERROR_FILE_PATH=/app/logs/error.log
          ENV
          echo ".env written"
          REMOTE

      - name: Pull & restart spring-server
        env:
          STAGING_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          STAGING_USER: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USER }}
          STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH }}
          IMAGE_TAG: ${{ needs.build-push.outputs.tag }}
          GHCR_ORG: ${{ github.repository_owner }}
          GHCR_ACTOR: ${{ github.actor }}
          GHCR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          ssh "$STAGING_USER@$STAGING_HOST" \
            DEPLOY_PATH="$STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH" \
            IMAGE_TAG="$IMAGE_TAG" \
            GHCR_ORG="$GHCR_ORG" \
            GHCR_ACTOR="$GHCR_ACTOR" \
            GHCR_TOKEN="$GHCR_TOKEN" \
            'bash -s' <<'REMOTE'
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "$GHCR_TOKEN" | docker login ghcr.io -u "$GHCR_ACTOR" --password-stdin
          cd "$DEPLOY_PATH"
          IMAGE_TAG="$IMAGE_TAG" docker compose -f docker-compose.staging.yml pull spring-server
          IMAGE_TAG="$IMAGE_TAG" docker compose -f docker-compose.staging.yml up -d --no-deps spring-server
          docker compose -f docker-compose.staging.yml ps spring-server
          REMOTE

  health-check:
    name: Health check
    needs: deploy
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Check Spring Boot Actuator (port 8080)
        run: |
          for i in $(seq 1 15); do
            status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 10 \
              "http://${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}:8080/actuator/health" || echo "000")
            [[ "$status" == "200" ]] && { echo "OK (HTTP $status)"; exit 0; }
            echo "Retry $i/15 (HTTP $status)..."; sleep 10
          done
          echo "::error::spring-server health check failed after 15 retries (2.5 min)"
          exit 1
